project.name: Conclave UI 重设计
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Editorial-precision tool UI — light airy background, thin-line hierarchy, high information density with breathing room, single indigo-blue brand color, Inter + Noto Sans SC, restrained surfaces with border-first depth.
project.designRead: B2B dev-tool dashboard / technical teams / calm editorial precision / medium density / avoid heavy shadows and neon accents

styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: Single brand primary #335c8e (indigo-blue) with neutral gray scale, state colors for semantic feedback only
styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: radius-sm 4px, radius-md 8px, radius-lg 12px, radius-full for pills/avatars. Clean edges, no soft blobs.
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Inter for Latin, Noto Sans SC / PingFang SC for CJK, JetBrains Mono for code. Sans-serif throughout, no serif display font.
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 4px base grid, 8px increments. Comfortable padding (16-24px), generous panel gutters (20-24px).
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: Thin borders (1px #e2e6eb) for surface separation, minimal shadows, subtle background tints for role/status identification. Tab pills, chip tags, monospace IDs.
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: Border-first surfaces. Static elements use borders and background layering only. Only floating layers (modals, dropdowns) use shadows with alpha <= 0.08.
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: Minimal decorative imagery. Icon-first indicators for roles and status. Clean geometric shapes for agent graph nodes.
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: Calm hover feedback, smooth transitions, no dramatic animations. Subtle focus rings on inputs.

sharedProjectShellContract.navigation: 256px left sidebar with meeting list, subtle separator between sidebar and main content. Top tab bar for meeting/workspace switch.
sharedProjectShellContract.headerTreatment: Minimal top bar: 56px height, meeting title left, status badges center, action buttons right. Thin bottom border.
sharedProjectShellContract.sidebar: Left sidebar 256px: meeting list with active highlight (primary-tint background), running-pulse indicator, footer stats.
sharedProjectShellContract.footer: No global footer in app-shell layout.
sharedProjectShellContract.CTAstyle: Primary: solid #335c8e button, white text. Secondary: transparent with border. Danger: semantic red. Warning: amber.
sharedProjectShellContract.alignment: Left-aligned content hierarchy, center-aligned headers, consistent 16-24px padding.
sharedProjectShellContract.radiusScale: radius-sm 4px (tags, inputs), radius-md 8px (cards, panels), radius-lg 12px (modals, large containers)
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: Static surfaces: border + background layering only. Floating layers: shadows alpha <= 0.08. No colored shadows.

pagePlan.title: 创建会议
pagePlan.businessScenario: Meeting creation form with topic input, document upload, and start button
pagePlan.visualNorthStar: Centered single-column card on airy background, minimal form, confident primary CTA

pagePlan.title: 会议仪表盘
pagePlan.businessScenario: Active meeting monitoring with agent graph, chat stream, and right-panel tabs (topic/evidence/artifact/report/token)
pagePlan.visualNorthStar: Command-center dashboard: sidebar nav + header progress + collapsible graph + two-column body (chat + right panel)

pagePlan.title: 工作区
pagePlan.businessScenario: IDE-style workspace with file tree, Monaco editor, and terminal panel
pagePlan.visualNorthStar: Classic IDE three-panel layout: narrow file tree sidebar, expansive code editor, dark terminal strip
